recommendation.rationale: NCB's intrinsic value ($31.15 two-stage, $37.06 constant growth) is significantly below the market price of $52.00. Using CAPM (11.8% cost of equity), the stock appears overvalued. Even the more optimistic DGM cost of equity (9.85%) does not justify the current price. The portfolio manager should consider underweighting or selling NCB unless there are growth catalysts not captured in our conservative dividend-based valuation.
